events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana, March 23 - April 7, currently on day 12 of 16. Route includes Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. Shopping for eyeglasses and fountain pens.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto before moving to next cities. Validate insurance and prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
